profile.name: agentmemory

intro.desc: Your coding agent remembers everything. No more re-explaining. Built on iii engine Persistent memory for Claude Code, GitHub Copilot CLI, Cursor, Gemini CLI, Codex CLI, Hermes, OpenClaw, pi, OpenCode, and any MCP client.
